items.title: Model Release Notes | OpenAI Help Center
items.author: help.openai.com
items.snippet:
OpenAI has made several major announcements in early 2026. On the model front, three new GPT-5 family models were released in March 2026: GPT-5.3 Instant, GPT-5.4 Thinking, and GPT-5.4 Pro. Earlier, in February 2026, OpenAI launched GPT-5.3-Codex along with a dedicated Codex app and GPT-5.2-Codex, expanding their code-focused AI offerings. These releases represent a significant cadence of model updates in the GPT-5 lineage.

OpenAI also made enterprise and safety-focused announcements in April 2

items.title: OpenAI Models - Release Notes March 2026 - Releasebot
items.author: releasebot.io
items.snippet: OpenAI has been releasing new GPT models at a rapid pace in 2026. In March 2026, OpenAI released GPT-5.4 across ChatGPT, the API, and Codex, along with a higher-end GPT-5.4 Pro variant for maximum performance and deeper reasoning on complex workloads. GPT-5.4 unites reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows, adds 'Thinking' mode in ChatGPT with upfront planning, and improves long-context web research. A lighter GPT-5.4 mini variant is also rolling out for Free and Go users. Prior to GPT-5.4, Open

items.title: OpenAI's new $100 ChatGPT Pro plan targets Claude Max with five times the Codex access
items.author: thenextweb.com
items.snippet:
OpenAI has been active on social media and its newsroom in April 2026 with several major announcements. The company launched a new $100/month ChatGPT Pro tier targeting Claude Max's price point, offering 5x more Codex access than Plus, with a 10x launch promotion running through May. OpenAI also released GPT-5.3 Instant Mini as the new fallback model in ChatGPT, replacing GPT-5 Instant Mini, touted for more natural conversation and stronger writing capabilities.
